data.body: WS-K STORY COMPLETE (K1 characterization, K2 review-as-workflow + RunnerAgentStep bridge [closes _PendingAgentRunner], K3 code_review example workflow + LangflowRunner retired). 10 of 12 stories done. Engine proven end-to-end: code_review.yaml runs fetch->agent->gate->comment. Remaining: WS-F (prompts inversion), WS-G (evals; needs F).
